purpose: Ranked research-direction seeds derived from a source-aware deep reading.

direction_seeds.title: <short direction title>
direction_seeds.seed_type: <assumption_violation | unavailable_mechanism | proxy_mismatch | evidence_gap | tiny_example | successor_paper_gap | reviewer_objection | negative_result | cross_domain_transfer>
direction_seeds.trigger_evidence_summary: <which paper claim, figure, formula, limitation, review, or successor signal triggered the seed>
direction_seeds.hidden_assumption_or_gap: <the assumption, missing mechanism, proxy mismatch, or evidence gap>

minimum_viable_experiment.setup: <smallest dataset, benchmark, synthetic case, proof case, or reproduction setup>

direction_seeds.killer_objection: <strongest reason this direction may be weak>
direction_seeds.killer_result: <smallest result that would make the direction compelling>

ranking_notes: <why the top seeds were ranked this way>
